summary: LIFETRACK_OS full-stack testing. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases passed (auth, character, skills with XP/level progression 100/250/450, quests complete/uncomplete with XP rollback, protected routes). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): registration -> character tab navigation, all 6 status bars (health/hunger/hygiene/energy/social/mood) with +/-/-5/+5 buttons, edit-name, add-skill + save-skill + xp-25 buttons, add-quest + save-quest + toggle-quest, login as admin, profile-email and logout-button all verified.

minor.issue: Returns 401 when no token provided (expected). Note: HTTPBearer with auto_error=False correctly returns 401 via custom check.

issues: Cyberpunk aesthetic renders correctly; touch targets on +/-/-5/+5 status bar buttons look compact but meet 44px minimum.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - non-blocking but should be migrated.

action_items: Optional: replace deprecated props.pointerEvents usages (likely from a nested React Native Web component) to clear console warning.
Optional: update test_credentials.md (currently empty) with admin@nexus.com / admin123 for future agents.
Note: frontend env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (correct for Expo Public env). Review request referenced EXPO_BACKEND_URL but actual usage in code (process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL) is proper.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret is committed in backend/.env - acceptable for preview but rotate in production.
bcrypt used with $2b$ format (verified via bcrypt.gensalt default).
No brute-force lockout implemented (not in requirements).
Auth via Bearer token (not httpOnly cookies) - matches frontend AsyncStorage design.
server.py is 470 lines - fine, no split needed yet; MongoDB _id excluded correctly in all reads.

Skill level progression xp_required_for_level(level) = 100 + (level-1)*150 matches spec (100, 250, 400, 550...). Requirements note said level2 needs 250 total-to-next which matches; verified in tests.
Quest uncomplete correctly clamps XP >= 0 when rolling back.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all tested flows pass; tab-by-text navigation can be flaky, direct /profile route works)

seed_data_creation: Created UI test user uitest_<ts>@nexus.com via registration flow; pytest user test_<hex>@nexus.com. Not cleaned up but data is isolated to test users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Admin: admin@nexus.com/admin123. Registration works. Tab labels rendered UPPERCASE (CHARACTER, SKILLS, QUESTS, PROFILE). Register link text is 'CREATE NEW IDENTITY'. Skill +25/+100 XP buttons use testIDs xp-25-<id> and xp-100-<id>. Quest toggle is toggle-quest-<id>. Logout button confirmed on /profile route.
rca_of_issue: No blocking issues found. All 13 backend tests and all tested frontend flows pass.
